name: local-llm-coding-agent-extension
description: Local-first coding agent bridge for a Go runtime.

localAgent.runtimeUrl.description: Base URL for the local Go runtime API.

localAgent.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for runtime requests in milliseconds.

localAgent.defaultWorkspaceRoot.description: Fallback project root path when no VS Code workspace folder is open.

localAgent.dryRun.description: If true, runtime actions are simulated and no file changes are applied.

localAgent.mode.description: Execution mode: agent executes deterministic tools first, chat prioritizes conversational model responses.
